title: Junior Frontend Developer at Tech Mahindra

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Tech Mahindra
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Tech Mahindra in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Tech Mahindra:
Tech Mahindra is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tech Mahindra!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
